clusters.justification: These terms share robust co-activation across amygdala-insula-cingulate circuitry, representing the generalized perception, generation, and regulation of valenced psychological states.
This cluster maps onto ventromedial prefrontal and ventral striatal co-activations that computationally assign subjective worth, encode expected outcomes, and drive goal-directed behavior.

These terms converge functionally within the midline cortical nodes of the default mode network to support the integration of self-referential narratives, autobiographical memory, and the abstraction of interpersonal agentic intentions.
